postSubmissionChangeNote: Reserve allocation changed after the original 2026-05-09 BaseScan submission; the 2026-05-13 resubmission used the updated public values.
ownerReserveCustodyNote: The 600,000,000 GCA reserve is held in a normal owner-controlled wallet. It is not a lock, vesting contract, or multisig.
description: GCA is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token deployed on Base Mainnet. GCA currently stands for Go China Access, a concept-stage community direction focused on the Go China macro narrative, bilingual Web3 education, public market research, and planned access to non-custodial quant risk tools. The intended Web3 Radar bridge is an access and membership layer for reports, risk-warning credits, backtests, ENTRY_READY signal review, position-size calculators, subscription discounts, and risk-control training. The contract creates 1,000,000,000 GCA at deployment and includes no post-deployment minting, burning, taxes, blacklist, or admin controls.
officialEmailNote: Official public project email listed on gcagochina.com. The original reply inbox was cxy070800@gmail.com.
returnReason: BaseScan could not process the update because the submitted token/project information was insufficient.
resubmissionChecklist: Official website is reachable over HTTPS
Official project email is listed on the website
32x32 SVG logo is reachable over HTTPS
Contract source is verified on BaseScan
Contract address is the valid Base Mainnet GCA token contract
Deployer wallet signs the address ownership message if BaseScan asks
socialLinkNote: Official Telegram was created after the initial BaseScan submission and was included in the 2026-05-13 BaseScan resubmission. Official X was activated and published on the website on 2026-05-14.
